[DQC.US.0147.9871] The concept us-gaap:OtherInvestments with an elimination value of 3,859,000 has a sign which is the same as the defaulted value for us-gaap:OtherInvestments of 12,191,251,000. It is expected that the defaulted value and eliminations for the line item us-gaap:OtherInvestments would be the opposite of each other.
